_instructions: Copy this file to your writable config location, update the connection and models, and do not commit local site-specific values. Prompts may optionally include a 'prompt_id' field to select a system prompt post. The top-level 'url' field is optional and records the site URL for provenance and multisite traceability. Recommended local path: wp-content/uploads/gregius-data/config/rag-benchmark-quality-config.json.

prompts.expected: Grounded single-entity answer with evidence and no false abstain

prompts.prompt: difference between paragraph and image blocks
prompts.expected: Compare response with evidence-aware handling for both entities when available
Truthful abstain with no invented facts
